CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "MFT - SYSTEMS MICROFLUIDICS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "MFT - SYSTEMS MICROFLUIDICS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "MFT - SYSTEMS MICROFLUIDICS"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "MFT"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "MFT")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-MFT
